name: better-peakbagger
description: Captures your Garmin and Strava activities into confidence-ranked Peakbagger drafts, plus GPX analysis, beta filters, and dark mode.
author: wilmtang

scripts.build: web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --ignore-files package.json package-lock.json CHANGELOG.md "node_modules/**" "test/**" "store-assets/**"
